title: SMILE SQUAD NCSD ORAL HEALTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: WICHITA CENTER FOR FAMILY AND COMMUNITY SMILE SQUAD NCSD ORAL HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides oral health care education and supplies, dental screenings, acute dental care, and assistance with navigating OHP coverage. 6031 SE King Road Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Low-income students in North Clackamas School District (NCSD) Hours: Varies Email (503) 353-6096 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 353-6096 Veronica Solorio [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: North Clackamas School District TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet 29 Services: Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Medicaid * Public Assistance Issues Oral Health Education/Information Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - FAMILY SUPPORT CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WICHITA CENTER FOR FAMILY AND COMMUNITY
